episodes.title: Escaping Jehovah’s Witnesses & Healing Religious Trauma | A Cult Survivor’s Story (Final Episode)
episodes.description:
What happens when the belief system you were raised in becomes the very thing you need to heal from?

In this powerful final episode of Let Glory Shine, Martha Glory sits down with Brooke Deanne to unpack what it really means to grow up inside a high-control religious environment and the long road to healing after leaving.

Brooke shares her story of being born into a third-generation Jehovah’s Witness family, navigating control, fear, and deep-rooted conditioning. From being disciplined and shamed by elders to finding herself in an abusive marriage that mirrored her childhood, her journey reveals the hidden layers of cult programming and trauma.

Together, Martha and Brooke dive into
✨ What cult conditioning actually does to your mind and body
✨ The trauma of being silenced, questioned, and exiled
✨ Why so many survivors struggle with identity and belonging
✨ Healing complex PTSD and retraining the nervous system
✨ The role of therapy, meditation, and deeper healing modalities
✨ Reclaiming your voice, truth, and personal power

This conversation is raw, honest, and deeply validating for anyone who has experienced religious trauma, spiritual abuse, or life inside a high-control environment.

You are not alone. Healing is possible.

If this resonates with you:

Like, comment, and share your story. Your voice matters.

episodes.title: From Cult Trauma to Unbreakable Strength | Manny Wolfe on Finding Beauty in Darkness
episodes.description:
Welcome to Episode 167 of A Warrior’s Spirit — the show where inner warriors shine in their light.

Presented by Praxis 33, aligning your thoughts, goals, and actions to create your best life.

This week’s guest is Manny Wolfe — consultant, author, and thought leader whose life journey is a powerful testament to resilience, transformation, and truth.

Growing up in a cult, Manny faced a deeply restrictive and traumatic environment that shaped his early understanding of the world. But instead of allowing that experience to define him, he used it as fuel for growth, self-discovery, and ultimately, impact.

In this powerful conversation, we explore:
How trauma can either break you—or build you
The journey of facing uncomfortable truths and reclaiming your identity
Why understanding your past is key to transforming your future
The art of meaningful conversation in a surface-level world
How pain can give birth to creativity, insight, and purpose

Manny reminds us that even in the darkest places, there is beauty to be found—and strength waiting to rise.

Watch now: https://youtu.be/59Ip9eMLA5U

Connect with Manny Wolfe:
Facebook: facebook.com/therealmannywolfe
Facebook Group: facebook.com/groups/theclientcreationmethod
Book: The Tao of the Unbreakable Man (available on Amazon)

Featured link: www.besitosbeauty.com

Watch A Warrior’s Spirit everywhere:
lnk.bio/daryl_praxis33

Stream on ROKU via the ProsperaTV Network app

YourGPSForSuccess.Net

Be sure to like, subscribe, and share so you never miss an episode.

#AWarriorsSpirit, #MannyWolfe, #CultSurvivor, #TraumaToStrength, #FindBeautyInDarkness, #Resilience, #PersonalGrowth, #HealingJourney, #Unbreakable, #PurposeFromPain

episodes.title: DIVINE ABUNDANCE: From Cult Survival to Empowered Leader
episodes.description:
In this powerful episode of Divine Abundance with Julie Loughlin, Julie sits down with author, coach, and show host Martha Glory Kartaoui to talk about her incredible journey of resilience and rebirth.

Martha opens up about leaving a cult, rebuilding her life from the ground up, and creating businesses that now serve and support others walking through similar struggles. She shares the story behind her book Let Glory Shine and gives us a behind-the-scenes look at her upcoming trauma-informed retreat in Raleigh, North Carolina (Sept 12–14)—a weekend of healing, empowerment, and transformation.

As Martha looks to the future, she reveals plans for her next book (set to release in early 2026) and how she continues to shine light for those ready to reclaim their power.

✨ Don’t miss this inspiring conversation that proves your past does not define your future—it can propel you into purpose.

#DivineAbundance #LetGloryShine #TraumaInformedHealing #FaithAndFreedom #CrownYourJourney
subjects: Samanta Roy Institute of Science and Technology

episodes.title: LET GLORY SHINE: When Stories Collide: A Cult Survivor Reunion with Orpah Sindt
episodes.description:
Let Glory Shine | When Stories Collide: A Cult Survivor Reunion with Orpah Sindt

In this deeply moving episode of Let Glory Shine, host Martha Glory Kartaoui sits down with a familiar face from her past, Orpah Sindt, a fellow survivor from the same cult that shaped much of their early lives. For the first time on camera, these two courageous women open up about their individual journeys through trauma, indoctrination, and spiritual abuse, and what it meant to finally reunite in Dallas just one month ago after years of separation.

Orpah shares her own raw testimony, revealing the emotional toll of her experience and the strength it took to reclaim her voice. Together, they explore the complexities of healing, the power of being seen, and what happens when two survivors come full circle in truth and transformation.

This is more than a conversation. It’s a divine intersection. A sacred homecoming.

Let Glory Shine...a light in the darkness for every Battle Angel who has ever felt alone in their pain. Don’t miss this unforgettable episode.

#LetGloryShine #CultSurvivor #HealingJourney #Reunion #TraumaRecovery #FaithAndFreedom
subjects: Samanta Roy Institute of Science and Technology

episodes.title: LET GLORY SHINE: Cults Uncovered - Martha Glory Kartaoui Answers the Questions You're Afraid to Ask
episodes.description:
Let Glory Shine | Cults Uncovered: Martha Glory Kartaoui Answers the Questions You’re Afraid to Ask

In this eye-opening episode of Let Glory Shine, host Martha Kartaoui tackles the most pressing and misunderstood questions about cults, not just from her own experience as a survivor, but to bring clarity, truth, and healing to others who may be questioning their own reality.

What is a cult, really?
How do smart, capable people end up in one?
What are the signs that you might be in a cult — even a “spiritual” one?
And if you are… how do you get out?

Martha holds nothing back as she breaks the silence around manipulation, mind control, spiritual abuse, and the slow erosion of identity. Whether you're in it, came out of it, or know someone who might be trapped, this episode is a must-watch.

You’re not crazy. You’re not alone. And yes, there is a way out. Let this episode be the light that guides you.

#LetGloryShine #MarthaKartaoui #CultAwareness #SpiritualAbuse #HealingFromManipulation #FaithAndFreedom #ProsperaTV
subjects: Samanta Roy Institute of Science and Technology
